basics.name: Sai Phani Krishna Arumalla
basics.label: AI/ML Engineer | LangGraph · RAG · PyTorch · AWS
basics.summary: MS Computer Science candidate at the University of South Florida (GPA: 3.66, May 2026) specializing in production LLM systems, multi-agent orchestration, RAG pipelines, and full-stack AI application development. Builder of three deployed AI systems: DealMind, ArchGuard, and OmniScan Engine, each live and used by real users. Passionate about shipping AI that solves real problems, not just demos.

work.name: DealMind (Independent Project)
work.summary: Built and deployed a production multi-agent financial intelligence platform end-to-end. Sole architect, engineer, and maintainer.
highlights: Designed multi-agent orchestration using CrewAI and LangGraph with specialized agents for research, analysis, and synthesis, replacing hours of manual financial due diligence
Built production RAG pipeline using ChromaDB vector database with document ingestion, chunking strategy optimization, and retrieval tuning for grounded LLM outputs
Implemented dynamic model routing scoring task complexity to route between Claude and Gemini APIs, reducing inference cost while maintaining output quality
Built HITL oversight checkpoints flagging low-confidence outputs for human review before finalization
Instrumented W&B Weave observability tracking hallucination rate, latency, and cost-per-request in production
Deployed full-stack application: Python/FastAPI backend, React/SSE frontend, Docker, AWS (EC2, S3), CI/CD via GitHub Actions

work.name: ArchGuard (Independent Project)
work.summary: Built a production LLM compliance agent that detects architectural drift in codebases and deployed it across three distribution channels used by real engineers.
highlights: Built LangGraph stateful agent that parses codebases via Tree-sitter AST analysis, embeds structural representations in ChromaDB, and reasons over retrieved context to detect compliance violations
Designed Golden Dataset evaluation benchmark from scratch, implementing LLM-as-judge grading and validating production performance at 0.92 F1-Score and 1.00 Recall
Built and deployed MCP (Model Context Protocol) server enabling standardized agent-to-tool integration across enterprise developer toolchains
Distributed as PyPI package, GitHub Action, and MCP server, enabling adoption without workflow changes
Applied HITL escalation for low-confidence compliance judgments, ensuring high-stakes decisions route to human review

work.name: University of South Florida
work.summary: Part-time student assistant at USF Disability Services, preprocessing academic documents and configuring assistive technology for students with disabilities.
highlights: Preprocessed 100+ academic documents into structured, machine-readable formats: tagged PDFs, caption files, and semantic annotations, applying document remediation techniques foundational to AI retrieval and assistive NLP systems serving students with visual and cognitive disabilities.

Translated disability profiles into assistive technology configurations for 50+ students per semester, building hands-on experience in human-centered AI deployment and ADA/Section 508 compliance standards increasingly mandated in enterprise AI products.
Coordinated adaptive exam environments for students with motor, sensory, and cognitive impairments, ensuring seamless integration of assistive input devices and accessibility software.

work.name: OmniScan Engine (Independent Project)
work.summary: Built a production multimodal deepfake detection system using PyTorch Vision Transformers and SE-ResNet, deployed on AWS with full-stack interface.
highlights: Trained Vision Transformer (ViT) and SE-ResNet ensemble using PyTorch on multimodal inputs (video, audio, image) for deepfake classification
Implemented XAI confidence heatmaps for model explainability, surfacing uncertainty visualizations to end users
Built FastAPI inference API and React frontend with automated PDF audit report generation
Deployed on AWS (EC2, S3) with Docker containerization and CI/CD automation via GitHub Actions

projects.name: DealMind
projects.description: Production multi-agent financial intelligence platform. CrewAI + LangGraph multi-agent orchestration, RAG with ChromaDB, dynamic model routing between Claude and Gemini, HITL oversight, W&B Weave observability. React/SSE frontend, FastAPI backend, deployed on AWS.
highlights: Live at deal-mind-ivory.vercel.app
Automates financial due diligence workflows end-to-end
Dynamic model routing reduces inference cost while maintaining quality

projects.name: ArchGuard
projects.description: Production LLM compliance agent for detecting architectural drift in codebases. LangGraph stateful agent, Tree-sitter AST parsing, ChromaDB RAG, custom Golden Dataset evaluation (0.92 F1, 1.00 Recall). Deployed as PyPI package, GitHub Action, and MCP server.
highlights: 0.92 F1-Score and 1.00 Recall on production benchmark
Deployed as PyPI package, GitHub Action, and MCP server
First production MCP server deployment in portfolio

projects.name: OmniScan Engine
projects.description: Production multimodal deepfake detection system. PyTorch ViT + SE-ResNet ensemble, XAI confidence heatmaps, FastAPI inference API, React frontend, AWS deployment.
highlights: Live at omniscan-engine.vercel.app
Multimodal: video, audio, and image detection
XAI heatmaps for model explainability
